channel.title: JLT What's Trending — LinkedIn
channel.description: What's Trending in Travel — LinkedIn Business edition

item.title: TEST — What's Trending LinkedIn feed check (safe to delete)
item.description: This is a test item used to register the What's Trending LinkedIn feed in Sociamonials. It carries no real content and is safe to delete once the RSS source has been added. The first real post will replace it on the next What's Trending run.
